# The final admin is protected: they can be neither killed nor demoted out of
# the admin group, so a repository can never be left without an admin.

exec git init
exec git config user.email test@sesam.dev
exec git config user.name 'Sesam Test'

exec sesam init --user admin
exec git add -A
exec git commit -m 'init sesam'

# Cannot delete the sole admin.
! exec sesam kill --user admin
stderr 'last admin'

# Cannot demote the sole admin out of the admin group.
! exec sesam user change-groups --user admin --group dev
stderr 'last admin'

# admin is still present and still an admin.
exec sesam user list
stdout 'admin'
exec sesam verify
